title: Local Government Finance Report 2025 to 2026
body: "This report sets out the aspects of the local government finance settlement for 2025 to 2026 which require approval by the House of Commons. It includes:   the proposed Revenue Support Grant distribution; the basis of the calculation of Baseline Funding Levels and ‘tariff’ and ‘top up’ payments that form part of the Business Rates Retention system; the determination of the ‘central’ and ‘local share’ of business rates; and the designation of business rates pools.  "
